programme.desc: Enthralled by her own imagination, 11-year-old Lacy spends the long summer at home with her mother and three strangers.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: A man moves into a new home that has supernatural forces lurking in the shadows. As dark entities start to threaten him, his brave dog comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: Lacey is frustrated with the new party planning methods; Wanda convinces Brent and Hank to take high school tests to see who is smarter.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated
programme.desc: The women can't get rid of Hank from a girls-only event; Brent stocks a new drink and Wanda is attracted to its cardboard promotion.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash helps his undocumented friend Khaled apply for asylum.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: When someone murders Capt. Frederick Burns, Aurora Teagarden must solve the case, despite never seeing eye to eye with the man.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: Guilty Until Proven Innocent
programme.desc: Antiques guru Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) investigates a murder after an old college friend becomes the prime suspect.

programme.title: Never Say Never Again
programme.desc: An aging James Bond (Sean Connery) makes an uncharacteristic mistake during a routine training mission, leading M (Edward Fox) to believe that the legendary British Intelligence spy is now past his prime. M indefinitely suspends Bond from active duty. However, when SPECTRE member Fatima Bush (Barbara Carrera) and her fellow terrorists successfully steal two nuclear missiles from the U.S. military,

programme.title: Site Unseen: An Emma Fielding Mystery
programme.desc: Archaeologist Emma Fielding unearths evidence of a 17th-century coastal Maine settlement that predates Jamestown, but the dead body that accompanies it embroils Emma and her students in a different kind of investigation.

programme.title: Twisted Neighbor
programme.desc: A cookbook editor moves into a gossipy neighborhood whose residents are obsessed with an app. When one of the neighbors suddenly disappears, the group chat pinpoints her as the prime suspect.

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: Under the Boardwalk
programme.desc: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.

programme.title: The Living Daylights
programme.desc: British secret agent James Bond (Timothy Dalton) helps KGB officer Georgi Koskov (Jeroen Krabbé) defect during a symphony performance. During his debriefing, Koskov reveals that a policy of assassinating defectors has been instated by new KGB head Leonid Pushkin (John Rhys-Davies). But as Bond explores this threat, a counterplot surfaces, involving a shady American arms dealer (Joe Don Baker) and

programme.title: 28 Years Later: The Bone Temple
programme.desc: Dr. Kelson makes a discovery that could change the world, while Spike's encounter with cult leader Jimmy Crystal becomes a nightmare he can't escape.

programme.title: The Carpenter's Son
programme.desc: A remote village in Egypt explodes into spiritual warfare when a carpenter, his wife and their son Jesus are targeted by supernatural forces.

programme.title: O'Dessa
programme.desc: A farm girl embarks on an epic quest to recover a cherished family heirloom in the post-apocalyptic future. Her journey soon leads her to a strange and dangerous city where she meets her one true love. However, in order to save his soul, she must put the power of destiny and music to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Next Goal Wins
programme.desc: With the 2014 World Cup qualifiers approaching, down-on-his-luck coach Thomas Rongen tries to turn the American Samoa soccer team into winners.

programme.title: Coming 2 America
programme.desc: Needing a male heir to the throne, Prince Akeem returns to Queens, N.Y., to find his long-lost son and bring him back to Zamunda.

programme.title: Corner Gas Animated

programme.title: Born Hungry
programme.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: A Chocolate Chip Cookie Mystery

programme.title: Octopussy
